examples: Put your watch forward one hour.
The event was put forward by a week.
He put forward an interesting idea.
We put the clocks forward in spring.
She put forward a new proposal.
We need to put forward a plan.
They put the meeting forward to Monday.
Don't forget to put your clocks forward.
example_translate: Переведи часы на один час вперёд.
Мероприятие было перенесено на неделю вперёд.
put forward.synonyms:
Выдвигать (предложение, идею) - propose, suggest, submit
Переводить (часы) вперёд - advance, move forward
